_comment: NBA 2025-26 Regular Season — hand-verified box scores from ESPN
=== PACE_UP BLOCK: games expected to run faster than base rate, higher totals ===
pace_up + def_matchup_weak: two signals — fast game, weak home defense exploited by fast away team
=== PACE_DOWN BLOCK: games expected to run slower than base rate, lower totals ===
pace_down + b2b_fatigue: slow game with fatigued away team
pace_down + b2b_fatigue: slow game with fatigued home team
=== B2B_FATIGUE BLOCK: one team on back-to-back, scoring suppressed ===
=== REST_ADVANTAGE BLOCK: well-rested home team benefits ===
=== DEF_MATCHUP_WEAK BLOCK: offense scores high against weak defense ===
=== DEF_MATCHUP_STRONG BLOCK: home offense suppressed by strong away defense ===
=== USAGE_ROLE_CHANGE BLOCK: key player restricted, team scoring suppressed ===
=== BLOWOUT_RISK BLOCK: heavy mismatch with momentum suppression — moderate not extreme spread ===
=== BASELINE BLOCK: no evidence signals — upsets, blowouts, and competitive games ===
